releaseNotes:
- Complete UI overhaul with a modern, clean, and minimalist aesthetic.
- Added seamless Light and Dark Mode themes.
- Implemented a smart Foreground Service for background thermal monitoring (fixes screen-off freezing issues).
- Added a new Universal In-App OTA Update checker.
- Refactored app navigation with a smooth Bottom Navigation Bar.
- Various under-the-hood optimizations for faster root command execution.
